scripts.test: npm run test:route-scoring && npm run test:map && npm run test:mock-exam && npm run test:mock-selection && npm run test:admin-questions && npm run test:db-persistence && npm run test:progress-analytics
scripts.test:admin-questions: node --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --test lib/admin/questionValidation.test.ts lib/admin/questionAdminHelpers.test.ts lib/questions/questionBankValidation.test.ts lib/homePageContent.test.ts lib/learnContent.test.ts lib/plans/plans.test.ts
scripts.test:db-persistence: node --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --test lib/db/questionRepository.test.ts lib/db/attemptRepository.test.ts lib/db/localDatabase.test.ts lib/supabase/schema.test.ts lib/auth/authRoutes.test.ts lib/auth/adminAccess.test.ts lib/logging/logger.test.ts lib/deployment/productionOps.test.ts
scripts.test:progress-analytics: node --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --test lib/analytics/progressAnalytics.test.ts lib/analytics/progressInsights.test.ts lib/analytics/learnerDashboard.test.ts lib/analytics/events.test.ts lib/analytics/recommendationEngine.test.ts lib/analytics/mistakeReview.test.ts lib/db/mistakeRetryQueue.test.ts lib/db/mistakeReviewRepository.test.ts lib/db/progressMigration.test.ts lib/practice/practiceSession.test.ts lib/review/reviewHistory.test.ts src/components/progress/visualAnswerReviewHelpers.test.ts
scripts.map:build:kings-cross-euston: npm run map:render:kings-cross-euston && npm run map:graph:kings-cross-euston
